summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 7 - Backend Refactoring. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed. Major backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular structure verified working correctly.

issues: Default date filter (last 30 days) hides older seeded accounts - this is expected behavior but may confuse users expecting to see all 10 accounts

passed_tests: API Health Check - refactored backend running
Auth: Login operator1/operator123 (seeded user with view/add/update, NO delete)
Auth: Login viewer1/viewer123 (seeded user with view only)
Dashboard: Summary endpoint with correct totals
Dashboard: Stats showing 10 accounts / 9 active / 1 closed
Account Detail: ACC000025 with enriched data
Ledger: Chronological order with running balance
Reports: Top borrowers endpoint (sorted by pending)
Users: List shows 7 users including seeded
Frontend: Login page loads and works
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct stats (10 accounts, 9 active, 1 closed)
Frontend: Reports page with 4 summary cards and charts
Frontend: Users page shows all 7 users
Frontend: Account detail page with sections

new_structure.auth.py: JWT, password hashing, token verification, permissions
new_structure.services/financial.py: Interest calculation, payment processing, ledger generation
new_structure.routes/accounts.py: Account CRUD, close/reopen, landed/received entries, ledger, villages
new_structure.routes/reports.py: Village summary, monthly trend, interest distribution, top borrowers

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring well-structured with clear separation of concerns
Permission checks correctly implemented in all protected endpoints
Financial calculations (interest, payment processing) correctly moved to services/financial.py
